About Mc New Excavating Inc

12+ years serving Baltimore and surrounding areas

Mc New Excavating Inc. has been a trusted name in Baltimore excavation for over a decade. Founded by lifelong Maryland residents, we understand the unique challenges of our local terrain and infrastructure.

Our approach is simple: get the job done right, on time, and within budget. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering commitment to safety on every project, large or small.

We're proud to be part of the Baltimore community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact, ensuring a sustainable future for our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Mc New Excavating Inc

Trusted excavation contractor professionals serving Baltimore, MD and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
